subcodes.first_line: Praise befits and is worthy of that Exalted Being Who hath ordained creation for the Dawning-Place of His signs and the Dayspring of His clear evidences [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد حضرت موجودی را لایق و سزاست که آفرینش را لاجل مشرق آیات و مطلع بیناتش
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @names and attributes of God, @power of prayer, @unity; oneness of humanity, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
